items.title: Mumbai's famed dabbawalas fed millions for over 100 years - now they are disappearing
items.dek: Dabbawalas, who deliver home-cooked meals, are leaving the trade as remote work and rising costs threaten their future.
items.body: Dabbawalas, who deliver home-cooked meals, are leaving the trade as remote work and rising costs threaten their future.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: After decades risking arrest, South Korea's tattoo artists step into the limelight
items.dek: Only licensed doctors were allowed to ink tattoos in Korea - breaking the law could lead to heavy fines or jail.
items.body: Only licensed doctors were allowed to ink tattoos in Korea - breaking the law could lead to heavy fines or jail.
